creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Recently I bought some new personal and server hardware, and I cannot find any traces of the behaviour you are reporting. Likely it is a local fault / BIOS / electrical / non-USB compliant device and so on. Try booting both legacy mode and UEFI mode. Any difference?

The only issue I've seen so far is a failure on an external 16-port USB 3.x HUB, which again I think is not related to FreeBSD.

FreeBSD is provided AS-IS. Feel free to use something else if you are not happy.

--HPS
